languages.text: Безопасность оказалась иллюзией. Хозяева Музеона продолжали неусыпно следить за каждым нашим шагом — и нанесли удар точно в момент, когда мы утратили бдительность, позволив себе крохотную передышку.

traits.locale_text: И эта ошибка едва не стала последней.

languages.text: It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently monitoring our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.
languages.original_text: Безопасность оказалась иллюзией. Хозяева Музеона продолжали неусыпно следить за каждым нашим шагом — и нанесли удар точно в момент, когда мы утратили бдительность, позволив себе крохотную передышку.

traits.locale_text: It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently watching our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.

It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently monitoring our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.
And this was not the last mistake to be made.

It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently watching our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.

It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently monitoring our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.

languages.text: 事实证明，那份安全感只是错觉。陈列馆的主人仍在紧盯着我们的一举一动。而他们选择在我们放松警惕、稍作喘息的那一刻发动袭击。
languages.original_text: It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently monitoring our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.

traits.locale_text: 事实证明，那份安全感只是错觉。陈列馆的主人仍在紧盯着我们的一举一动。而他们选择在我们放松警惕、稍作喘息的那一刻发动袭击。

languages.text: La sensación de seguridad resultó ser una ilusión. Los amos del Museion vigilaban cada paso que dábamos y atacaron en cuanto bajamos la guardia para descansar un momento.
languages.original_text: It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently monitoring our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.

traits.locale_text: La sensación de seguridad resultó ser una ilusión. Los amos del Museion vigilaban cada paso que dábamos y atacaron en cuanto bajamos la guardia para descansar un momento.

languages.text: Mais ce sentiment de sécurité n'était qu'une illusion. Les maîtres du Muséion n'avaient jamais cessé de nous surveiller, et ils frappèrent au moment précis où nous avions baissé la garde pour nous accorder un bref répit.
languages.original_text: It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently monitoring our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.

traits.locale_text: Mais ce sentiment de sécurité n'était qu'une illusion. Les maîtres du Muséion n'avaient jamais cessé de nous surveiller, et ils frappèrent au moment précis où nous avions baissé la garde pour nous accorder un bref répit.

languages.text: Güvenlik hissinin bir illüzyon olduğu ortaya çıktı. Museion'un efendileri, hâlâ attığımız her adımı dikkatle izliyordu. Tam gardımızı düşürdüğümüz ve kendimize kısa bir mola verdiğimiz anda saldırdılar.
languages.original_text: It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently monitoring our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.

traits.locale_text: Güvenlik hissinin bir illüzyon olduğu ortaya çıktı. Museion'un efendileri, hâlâ attığımız her adımı dikkatle izliyordu. Tam gardımızı düşürdüğümüz ve kendimize kısa bir mola verdiğimiz anda saldırdılar.

languages.text: Das Gefühl von Sicherheit erwies sich als Illusion. Die Meister des Museions verfolgten noch immer jeden unserer Schritte ... und schlugen in exakt dem Moment zu, als wir unvorsichtig wurden und uns eine kurze Pause gönnten.
languages.original_text: It turned out the sense of security was an illusion. The Museion's masters were still intently monitoring our every step — and they struck at the exact moment we let our guard down and allowed ourselves a brief respite.

traits.locale_text: Das Gefühl von Sicherheit erwies sich als Illusion. Die Meister des Museions verfolgten noch immer jeden unserer Schritte ... und schlugen in exakt dem Moment zu, als wir unvorsichtig wurden und uns eine kurze Pause gönnten.

languages.text: そして、このミスは最後のミスではなかった。
languages.original_text: And this was not the last mistake to be made.

traits.locale_text: そして、このミスは最後のミスではなかった。
